videos.video_subject: When Jude Bellingham joined Real Madrid they gave him the number 5 shirt, the number once worn by club legend Zinedine Zidane, and the 20 year old lived up to it with a sensational debut season
videos.video_script: When Jude Bellingham joined Real Madrid, they handed him the number five shirt. That number belonged to Zinedine Zidane, a Madrid legend and a World Cup winner. Giving it to a twenty year old was a huge statement, some said it was too much pressure. Then Bellingham scored in almost every single game, and the whole Bernabeu started chanting his name. He didn't just wear the legend's number. He became the new legend. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Jude Bellingham Real Madrid white jersey, Jude Bellingham arms wide celebration, Jude Bellingham screaming celebration close up, Jude Bellingham Bernabeu goal, Jude Bellingham England white jersey, Jude Bellingham number 5, Jude Bellingham face close up, Jude Bellingham winning goal, Jude Bellingham Real Madrid debut, Jude Bellingham celebration
